<!--
Thanks for your contribution! Please keep the PR focused: one logical change per PR.
Make sure the local dev stack still boots (see CONTRIBUTING.md / docs/DEVELOPMENT.md).
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? 1–3 sentences. -->

## Related issue

<!-- "Closes #123", "Refs #456", or "n/a" if there's no issue. -->

## Change type

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour/API)
- [ ] 📚 Docs
- [ ] ♻️  Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] 🔧 Chore / tooling / deps

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`.
- [ ] No secrets, `.env`, or generated files committed.
- [ ] Existing functionality still works (dev stack boots, API/UI behave as expected).
- [ ] Tests added/updated where relevant (`npm test` in `api/`).
- [ ] New external input is validated with Zod (`api/src/schema.js`).
- [ ] New remote-resource / network / auth features default to the most locked-down setting.
- [ ] Docs (`README.md`, `docs/`, `CHANGELOG.md`) updated if needed.

## Notes for review

<!-- Anything reviewers should look out at, tricky areas, screenshots, etc. -->
